tripName: Solo Parisian Charm: A Budget-Friendly 3-Day Adventure

restaurants.name: L'As du Fallafel
restaurants.description: A legendary spot in the Marais known for serving arguably the best falafel sandwich in Paris. Expect a line, but it moves quickly. It's a true Parisian street food experience.

restaurants.name: Crêperie Genia
restaurants.description: A charming and authentic crêperie in Montmartre, offering both savory galettes and sweet crêpes at very reasonable prices. Perfect for a quick, delicious, and budget-friendly meal.

restaurants.name: Bouillon Chartier Grands Boulevards
